summary: Verified both P0/P1 bug fixes: Permission Enforcement and Invoice Logo Upload. Both features working correctly.
passed_tests: Permission Enforcement: Restricted user (test_restricted@test.com) only sees 3 sidebar items (Dashboard, POS, Items)
Permission Enforcement: Restricted user only sees 2 Quick Actions (POS, Items)
Permission Enforcement: Restricted user cannot see Inventory, Settings, Users, or other restricted pages in sidebar
Permission Enforcement: Admin user (demo@brandmafia.com) sees all 33 sidebar items
Permission Enforcement: Admin user sees all 12 Quick Actions
Invoice Logo Upload: Upload button triggers file selection
Invoice Logo Upload: File upload to /api/uploads/images endpoint returns 200 with URL
Invoice Logo Upload: Success toast 'Logo uploaded successfully' appears after upload
Invoice Logo Upload: Logo preview updates to show uploaded image
Invoice Logo Upload: Uploaded image is accessible via returned URL
critical_code_review_comments: Permission enforcement correctly implemented in PermissionContext.js with hasPageAccess() and filterNavItems()
App.js correctly uses filterNavItems() at line 216 to filter sidebar items
DashboardPage.js correctly filters Quick Actions using hasPageAccess() at line 111
Invoice logo upload fixed by reordering router.include before static files mount in server.py (lines 5051-5055)
Upload endpoint at /api/uploads/images correctly handles file uploads and returns proper URL format
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both P0/P1 bugs fixed and verified: 1) Permission enforcement working - restricted users only see allowed sidebar items and quick actions based on their permissions. 2) Invoice logo upload working - uploads succeed with success toast and logo appears in preview. The router.include_router was moved before static files mount to fix the upload endpoint routing issue.

permission_enforcement.sidebar_filtering: WORKING - Restricted user sees only Dashboard, POS, Items (3 items)
permission_enforcement.quick_actions_filtering: WORKING - Restricted user sees only POS, Items (2 items)
permission_enforcement.admin_full_access: WORKING - Admin sees all 33 sidebar items and 12 quick actions
permission_enforcement.restricted_pages_hidden: WORKING - Inventory, Settings, Users, etc. not visible to restricted user

invoice_logo_upload.preview_update: WORKING - Logo preview shows uploaded image
invoice_logo_upload.image_accessibility: WORKING - Uploaded images accessible via returned URL
